name: Hou Node Info
description: Get detailed information about an existing Houdini node: type, category, inputs, outputs, and children.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    from src.utils.hou_bridge import get_bridge

    path = inputs.get('node_path') or self.get_parameter('node_path', '/obj')

    try:
        bridge = get_bridge()
        info = bridge.node_info(path)
        self.log_info(f'Node: {info["path"]} | Type: {info["type"]} | Children: {len(info["children"])}')
        await self.set_output('info', info)
        await self.set_output('node_type', info.get('type', ''))
        await self.set_output('children', info.get('children', []))
    except Exception as e:
        self.log_error(f'Failed to get node info: {e}')
        await self.set_output('info', {})
        await self.set_output('node_type', '')
        await self.set_output('children', [])

    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {}
